title: Modernize the legacy monthly report module
body: Voice report (translated from Hinglish): 'Yaar, the monthly report module is bahut purana code — 2019 ka. When a group has no expenses it crashes with ZeroDivisionError, report hi nahi banta. Please modernize splitsathi/legacy_report.py: clean functions, f-strings, handle the empty-group case gracefully, and add tests. Existing report output should stay exactly the same for non-empty groups.'
